Sentret

#0160 Feraligatr #0162 Furret
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Sentret is a Normal type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Sentret

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0161
Type Normal
Species Scout Pokémon
Height 0.8 m (2′07″)
Weight 6.0 kg (13.2 lbs)
Abilities 1. Run Away
2. Keen Eye
Frisk (hidden ability)
Local № 0019 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0019 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0109 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0026 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 1 Attack
Catch rate 255 (33.3% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 43
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Base stats

HP 35
180 274
Attack 46
87 210
Defense 34
65 183
Sp. Atk 35
67 185
Sp. Def 45
85 207
Speed 20
40 152
Total 215 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Sentret.

2

Evolution chart

#0161
Sentret
Normal
(Level 15)
#0162
Furret
Normal

Sentret changes

  • In Generations 2-4, Sentret has a base experience yield of 57.
  • In Generations 2-7, Sentret has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Gold A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
Silver It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
Crystal When acting as a lookout, it warns others of danger by screeching and hitting the ground with its tail.
Ruby
Sapphire		 When SENTRET sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this POKéMON becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.
FireRed It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
LeafGreen A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
Emerald They take turns standing guard when it is time to sleep. The sentry awakens the others if it senses danger. If one becomes separated, it turns sleepless with fear.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
HeartGold A very cautious Pokémon, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
SoulSilver It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
X When acting as a lookout, it warns others of danger by screeching and hitting the ground with its tail.
Y It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 When Sentret sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this Pokémon becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Sentret does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Sentret cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Sentret learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Sentret gen 9 learnset page.

sentry
a guard
ferret
a rodent mammal
